sentence_reviews.text: Signals are transformed into frequency or basis domains where global structure can be modeled efficiently.

sentence_reviews.text: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Signal processing & harmonic analysis, Linear algebra.
